visualize widget html template | returns "<!DOCTYPE html>...<title>Visualize Widget</title>" string with VisualizeWidget/createStreamingRenderer/connectToHost script

string checks to json schema | iterates A.checks switch i.kind (min/max/email/url/uuid/regex/datetime/ip...) building {type:'string',minLength,maxLength,format,pattern}

parse url parts | regex match of url string returning {host,path,protocol,search,hash,relative}
extract http request data | getHeader('host')+new URL(A.path), returns {url, 'http.method':A.method||'GET', 'http.query':search, 'http.fragment':hash}
is success result | predicate: A is object with typeof A.success=='boolean' and A.error undefined or string
probe mcp server oauth | creates MCP Client {name:'custom3p-desktop'}, connect() with AbortController timeout, throws `OAuth probe timeout after ${e}ms`, then Tot(A)
connect mcp server | checks locked/missing config, connects with Authorization `Bearer ${e.bearer}`, returns {config,client,tools,instructions:getInstructions(),dispose}
emit metric | calls $2t (sentry-metrics) with {type,name,value,unit,attributes} and {scope}
emit counter metric | wKA('counter', A, e, t)
emit gauge metric | wKA('gauge', A, e, t)
emit distribution metric | wKA('distribution', A, e, t)
is sentry internal error | predicate: A is object and _$e (Symbol.for('SentryInternalError')) in A
delay | return new Promise(e => setTimeout(e, A))
create minidump sender | returns async fn under mutex.runExclusive that finds minidumps, checks age, readFile, sends with attachmentType 'event.minidump', logs 'Sending minidump', unlinks
is base64 string | A==='' true; length%4!==0 false; try atob(A) returns true else false
is base64 url string | identifierRegex.test then replace [-_]->+/ , padEnd to multiple of 4 with '=', then Ttt (isBase64String)
write deployment mode | under configWriteMutex writes deploymentModeKey=A into config JSON via Lr, logs '[custom-3p] deploymentMode written', resetMainWindowBounds
switch deployment mode | branches on '1p'/'3p'/other: relaunchApp, clearAllSessionCredentials entries, aH(A), loads CUSTOM_3P_ORIGIN into mainView.webContents
apply config and enable3p mode | NR(); await applyConfigById(A) (mLt); await aH('3p') (writeDeploymentMode '3p')
normalize model id | strips /^arn:aws...:bedrock:.../ and /anthropic./ prefixes, [..] / -vN / @date / -date suffixes from a model id string
format claude model label | matches /^claude-([a-z]+)-(\d+)(?:-(\d{1,2}))?$/ and returns `Claude ${Family} ${major.minor}`
resolve inference models | merges adminList/discovered into {id,name:U2i(name),labelOverride}, warns 'inferenceModels entries not in Bedrock discovery', filters by FEA(A,id).ok
is grand prix supported | process.platform==='darwin' && Object.keys(LjA()).length>0 (partner allowlist); consumed at feature-flag key grandPrix
get grand prix status | returns U3i() ? {status:'supported'} : {status:'unavailable'}; call site key grandPrix
format url origin | parses URL and returns `${protocol}//${host}`, else '<none>' (empty) or '<unparseable>'
summarize mcp server config | returns {name,transport,urlDisplay:blA(url),headerKeys,oauthNote,issues}; transport from type/transport/(command?'stdio':'?'), only http/sse validated via Nst
